---
title: Schedule
---

| Lesson | Date | MRI Topic | MRI Module| Technical Topic | Technical Module |
|--------|------|---------------|----------|-----------------|------------------|
| 1. | TBD | Magnetic Resonance Imaging | [1.1](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-mri_anat/lectures/mri_overview/mri_overview.html#/title-slide) | Terminal and Variables | [1.1](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/lectures/01-the_terminal/01-the_terminal.html#/title-slide), [1.2](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/lectures/02-variables/02-variables.html#/title-slide) |
| 2. | TBD | T1-weighted Signal | [1.2](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-mri_anat/lectures/t1w_signal/t1w_signal.html#/title-slide) | Scripting and For Loops | [1.3](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/lectures/03-scripting/03-scripting.html#/title-slide), [1.4](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/lectures/04-for_loops/04-for_loops.html#/title-slide) |

<!--
| 2. Scripting and for loops | TBD | Module 1.3, 1.4 |
| 2. T1-weighted signal | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 3. Conditional statements | TBD | Module 1.5 |
| 3. DICOM | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 4. Advanced looping | TBD | Module 1.6 |
| 4. NIfTI | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 5. Shells | TBD | Module 2.1 |
| 5. Bias correction | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 5. Cluster computing | TBD | Module 2.2 |
| 6. Brain extraction | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 6. Scheduling jobs | TBD | Module 2.3 |
| 7. Tissue segmentation | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 7. Conda and project environments | TBD | Module 2.4, 2.5 |
| 8. Transformation | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 8. Tracking changes | TBD | Module 2.6 |
| 9. ITK-snap | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 9. Tracking changes, cont'd | TBD | Module 2.6 |
| 10. ANTs | Slides | Code | Practice |
| 10. Team development | TBD | Module 2.7 |
| 10. FreeSurfer | Slides | Code | Practice |
-->

---

For each lesson, please refer to the [Anatomic MRI](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-mri_anat/pages/modules.html) and [Computational Foundations](https://nmuncy.github.io/course-basic_bash/pages/modules.html) module pages for exercises and additional resources.
